TRUSTED BY LEADING PRIVATE CAPITAL FIRMS

Affinity Overview
CRM
Automatically capture data from email, calendar, and meetings to keep your pipeline current without manual updates.
Relationship Intelligence
See who on your team knows decision-makers at target companies and surface warm introductions to turn your network into dealflow.
AI & Automation
Enrich contact profiles automatically, surface relevant opportunities, and automate workflows to keep your team focused on deals.
Analytics & Reporting
Monitor dealflow, measure team performance, and get real-time pipeline visibility for faster decisions.
Relationships
are
the
backbone
of
private
markets—private
equity,
venture
capital,
investment
banking,
and
beyond.
Every
deal,
every
partnership,
every
exit
traces
back
to
who
you
know
and
how
well
you
know
them.
But
the
work
of
building
and
maintaining
relationships
gets
derailed
by
busywork.
The
context,
the
connections,
the
follow-through.
It's
all
there,
scattered
across
the
inboxes
and
calendars
of
your
team.
No
one
has
time
to
piece
it
together.
That's
why
Affinity
exists:
to
give
you
time
back
for
the
work
that
actually
requires
you
.
AFFINITY Guide
7 Modern workflows to win deals faster in 2026
See how firms like BlackRock, Bessemer, and Notable Capital win proprietary deals in days, manage hundreds of relationships without letting any go cold, and 5× their research capacity. Real workflows with measurable results.
Get the guide
CUSTOMER STORIES
50%
Decrease in time spent on the deal flow process
Venture Capital
8VC cuts deal flow process time by 50% using Affinity CRM and the Pathfinder extension
Read full case study
15+
Deals closed since implementing Affinity
Private Equity
How Seaside Equity Partners closed 15+ deals and built thousands of new relationships with Affinity
Read full case study
66%
Increase in deals reviewed annually since using Affinity
Private Equity
Venture Capital
How Motive Partners increased the number of deals reviewed in one year by 66%
Read full case study
request DEMO
Start closing more deals
Let us customize your demo. Fill in this short form and a relationship intelligence expert will be in touch.

Get started
Integrations
Seamless workflow integrations
Access relationship intelligence and deal insights directly within your daily workflows to make faster, more confident investment decisions
See integrations
Get an estimate
Purpose-built integration ecosystem
Email & communication tools
Access and update relationship data where you work
Browser extensions
Surface relationship insights during deal research and networking
Platform connections
Streamline workflows across your essential tools
Power your daily communications
Surface relationship insights and deal intelligence directly within Gmail, Outlook, and Slack while automatically capturing every interaction.
Download Affinity for Outlook
Accelerate deal discovery
Access relationship intelligence while browsing LinkedIn and company websites to identify valuable connections and opportunities instantly.
Download Pathfinder
Unify your tech stack
Connect Affinity with Typeform, Mailchimp, and other essential platforms to automate deal intake, investor communications, and portfolio support.
native
Built-in connections to Affinity that work with your most common business workflows, including direct data partner integrations.
third-party
Ready-made integrations created by our developer network, available to anyone using both Affinity and the partner service.
custom
Specialized, bespoke integrations developed by the Affinity professional services team for an additional fee.

hits.title: Canva has acquired Affinity in an effort to compete with Adobe
EA Announces Agreement to be Acquired by PIF, Silver Lake, and Affinity Partners
Affinity's Adobe-rivaling creative suite is now free for six months

analysis.name: Affinity
analysis.value_proposition: Relationship intelligence CRM that automatically captures activity from email and calendar, surfaces warm introductions across team networks, and surfaces dealflow for private capital firms without manual data entry.
analysis.ideal_customer: Venture capital, private equity, investment banking, family offices, fund of funds, accelerators, corporate venture capital, private credit, and asset management firms

features.name: crm
features.description: Core pipeline and contact management purpose-built for private capital deal workflows

features.name: activity capture
features.description: Automatically captures interactions from email, calendar, and meetings to keep pipeline current without manual entry

features.name: relationship intelligence
features.description: Surfaces who on the team knows decision-makers at target companies and identifies warm introduction paths

features.name: warm introduction surfacing
features.description: Maps team network to target companies to identify and surface warm intro opportunities for dealflow

features.name: ai contact enrichment
features.description: Automatically enriches contact and company profiles with third-party data without manual input

features.name: ai opportunity surfacing
features.description: AI surfaces relevant investment opportunities based on firm criteria and relationship signals

features.name: workflow automation
features.description: Automates repetitive CRM workflows to keep teams focused on deal execution

features.name: analytics & reporting
features.description: Monitors dealflow, measures team performance, and provides real-time pipeline visibility for faster decisions

features.description: Bespoke integrations developed by Affinity professional services team for enterprise needs

differentiators: Relationship Intelligence as a proprietary category — maps who on the team knows who at any target company
Automatic activity capture from email and calendar with no manual data entry required
Claims 220 hours saved per person annually on manual data entry
Purpose-built exclusively for private capital (VC, PE, IB, family offices) vs. generic CRM
Network-to-dealflow flywheel: converts existing team relationships into warm inbound sourcing
Dual product offering: standalone Affinity CRM and Affinity for Salesforce for firms already on Salesforce
Pathfinder extension surfaces relationship intelligence while actively browsing LinkedIn and company sites
300+ contacts created per user to grow network via auto-capture

recent_ships.what: Sourcing module — new dedicated deal sourcing feature added to Affinity CRM navigation
Summer Product Releases bundle — multiple features shipped together in a named release

praised: "Affinity isn't just better—for most teams, it'll make the difference between managing your pipeline to success, versus not tracking it at all." — Kevin Zhang, Partner, Bain Capital Ventures
8VC reported 50% decrease in time spent on deal flow process
Seaside Equity Partners reported 15+ deals closed and thousands of new relationships built
Motive Partners reported 66% increase in deals reviewed annually
